Hero.headline: Manage Your Business Shipments in One Platform
Hero.subheadline: Book, track, and pay for cargo shipments — all from a single dashboard. Built for companies that want smarter logistics.

Landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need, in one platform
Landing.featuresLead: From company onboarding to payment — every step of your logistics, simplified.
Landing.f1Body: Create orders by choosing origin, destination, and service type. See the estimated price instantly before confirming.
Landing.f2Body: Railway cargo service for port-to-port routes — fast, reliable, and ready to expand to other transport modes.
Landing.f3Title: Track with a Consignment Note (CN) number
Landing.f3Body: Check status, timeline, and photo evidence anytime. Publicly accessible — no login required.
Landing.f4Body: Automatic invoicing per shipment. Pay directly via Virtual Account, QRIS, or credit card.
Landing.f5Body: Decide who manages bookings, who monitors shipments, and who handles finance — all in one portal.
Landing.f6Body: Start with rail, then expand to trucking, sea, or air — without switching platforms.
Landing.footerTagline: Unified logistics platform to manage your business bookings and shipments.
Landing.footerRights: © IDNVerse Karya Nusantara. All rights reserved.

LandingHowItWorks.title: Start shipping in 4 easy steps
LandingHowItWorks.lead: From registration to delivery — all in one platform.
LandingHowItWorks.s1Body: Register your company. Our team will review and activate your account promptly.
LandingHowItWorks.s2Body: Choose a route, FCL or LCL service, and get an instant price estimate before confirming.
LandingHowItWorks.s3Body: Monitor shipment status with photo evidence — from loading to delivery at destination.
LandingHowItWorks.s4Body: Receive per-shipment invoices, pay via Virtual Account, QRIS, or bank transfer.

LandingServices.title: The right shipping solution for your business
LandingServices.lead: Choose a service that fits your cargo needs — from full containers to add-on services.
LandingServices.fclBody: A full container exclusively for your cargo. Ideal for large volumes with maximum security.
LandingServices.lclBody: Ship without renting a full container. Save costs with our rack management system.
LandingServices.railBody: Shipping via railway between major ports. Efficient, reliable, and eco-friendly.
LandingServices.addonBody: Pickup, packing (palletizing, wooden crate), and special handling (forklift, fragile, heavy cargo).

LandingTrackingCta.title: Track your shipment now
LandingTrackingCta.lead: Just enter a Consignment Note (CN) number — no login required. Get real-time status, timeline, and photo evidence.

LandingWhy.title: One platform, all your logistics needs
LandingWhy.lead: We built INVLOGI to simplify B2B logistics complexity — transparent, efficient, and ready to scale with your business.
LandingWhy.w1Body: Booking, tracking, invoicing, and payments in one digital ecosystem.
LandingWhy.w2Body: Instant price estimates before booking. No hidden costs.
LandingWhy.w3Body: Every shipment stage includes photos and notes — from loading to unloading.
LandingWhy.w4Body: Pay now or later before due date via VA, QRIS, or credit card.
LandingWhy.w5Body: One portal for Company Admin, Ops PIC, and Finance PIC — each with appropriate access.
LandingWhy.w6Body: Architecture ready for trucking, sea freight, and air cargo without rebuilding the foundation.

LandingTestimonials.title: What our customers say
LandingTestimonials.t1Quote: INVLOGI simplified our entire logistics process. From booking to payment, everything in one place. Our operations team is far more productive.
LandingTestimonials.t2Quote: Real-time tracking with photo evidence really helps us monitor cargo without having to call the vendor constantly.
LandingTestimonials.t3Quote: Payment process is much easier now. Per-shipment invoicing and online payment options make our finance team more efficient.

LandingEstimateCta.title: Calculate your shipping cost estimate
LandingEstimateCta.lead: Enter route and service, get an estimated price in seconds. No login, no commitment.

LandingFaq.title: Frequently asked questions
LandingFaq.q1A: FCL (Full Container Load) is a service where you rent an entire container. LCL (Less Container Load) lets you ship goods without renting a full container — ideal for small to medium volumes.
LandingFaq.q2Q: How do I register as a company?
LandingFaq.q2A: Click the "Register" button on the homepage, fill in company details (name, NPWP, NIB, address) and PIC data. Our team will review and activate your account within 1 business day.
LandingFaq.q3Q: How long does account verification take?
LandingFaq.q3A: Verification typically completes within 1 business day after complete data is received. We'll notify you once your account is active.
LandingFaq.q4A: We accept payments via Virtual Account, Bank Transfer, QRIS, and Credit Card — all processed through Midtrans, a secure payment gateway.
LandingFaq.q5Q: Can I track a shipment without logging in?
LandingFaq.q5A: Yes! Our public tracking page allows anyone to track a shipment using just the waybill number — no account needed.
LandingFaq.q6Q: How does the billing cycle work?
LandingFaq.q6A: Invoices are issued per shipment. Companies can choose a billing cycle: 1st-15th, 16th-end of month, both, or end of month. Payment can be made immediately (Pay Now) or before the due date (Pay Later).

LandingCtaFinal.title: Ready to optimize your company's logistics?
LandingCtaFinal.lead: Register now and start managing shipments in minutes. No registration fee — instant access to all features.

Tracking.title: Track Your Shipment
Tracking.subtitle: Enter your Consignment Note (CN) number to see real-time shipment status — no login required.
Tracking.notFound: Shipment not found. Please check your Consignment Note (CN) number.
Tracking.emptyState: Enter a waybill number above to start tracking your shipment.

PlaceholderPages.servicesBody: This page will describe INVLOGI services (rail cargo, FCL/LCL, and more). Marketing and ops can replace this copy anytime.
PlaceholderPages.infoBody: Use this page for FAQ, policies, or announcements. Replace with official content from your team.

Estimate.title: Shipping cost estimate
Estimate.subtitle: Enter route and service to see an indicative price. No login — company discounts are not applied here.
Estimate.loadError: Failed to load master data. Check connectivity and API configuration.
Estimate.estimateError: Could not compute the estimate. Check route and service selections.
Estimate.formDescription: Pick locations, mode, and service. For FCL choose a container type; for LCL fill weight or CBM.
Estimate.resultNote: Indicative figure from sell rates and routes in the system. Final pricing follows operational confirmation.
